quote.text: "We love to share with our guests the peace and the Moroccan way of life ŌĆö every journey is a chance to discover something genuine."

homepage_about.title: Morocco's Private Tour Specialists ŌĆö Based in Marrakech & Casablanca
homepage_about.p1: Elbo Tours is a family-run Moroccan travel company with over 6 years of experience organising private tours and transfers across the country. We are not a call centre or a booking platform ŌĆö we are a small, passionate team of local guides and drivers who live and breathe Morocco.
homepage_about.p2: Whether you need a seamless airport pickup, a day trip to the Atlas Mountains, or a 10-day grand journey through the Sahara and imperial cities, we build every trip around you ŌĆö your pace, your interests, your group.

homepage_services.title: Everything you need for Morocco
homepage_services.tours_body: Tailor-made multi-day itineraries across Morocco ŌĆö desert, mountains, coast, and medinas. Your group only.
homepage_services.airport_body: Reliable, on-time pickups and drop-offs at Marrakech Menara and all major Moroccan airports.
homepage_services.city_body: Comfortable private transfers between any two cities in Morocco. No shared buses, no fixed timetables.
homepage_services.fleet_body: Modern, air-conditioned vehicles from saloon cars to 19-seat minibuses ŌĆö with experienced drivers.

why.title: Why should you travel with us?
why.body: Testimonials tell one story. Here's ours.

items.title: Authenticity first
items.body: Local Berber guides who love sharing their culture, not just showing landmarks.

items.title: Completely private
items.body: Your group only ŌĆö no strangers, no fixed schedules, no rushed stops.

items.title: Tailor-made for you
items.body: Every detail shaped around your pace, interests, and travel style.

items.title: Handpicked stays
items.body: Riads, desert camps and mountain lodges chosen for character and warmth.

items.title: Door-to-door service
items.body: We collect you from any arrival city and handle every transfer.

items.title: Sustainable travel
items.body: We support local communities and travel gently with nature and wildlife.

testimonials.title: Reviews from people like you
testimonials.body: Our guests' stories are the most honest proof of what we do.

items.name: Lars & Marja
items.text: Exotic places we would never have found alone. A family atmosphere, charming riads, and dining experiences that were simply fantastic. Our best trip ever.

items.name: Anne
items.text: Our guide's exceptional knowledge of history and culture, and his desire to share it with us, was truly extraordinary.

items.name: Toril & Andreas
items.text: Breakfast on top of a dune was truly amazing. Nothing but positive experiences ŌĆö comfort, security, and a once-in-a-lifetime cultural encounter.

cta.title: Ready to explore Morocco?
cta.sub: Tell us your dates and we'll shape a trip that fits perfectly. No two journeys are the same.

about.hero_sub: Your trusted private transport partner across Morocco since 2020.
about.story_title: From Casablanca to All of Morocco
about.story_p1: Elbo Tours began in 2020 in Casablanca, born from a simple frustration: too many visitors to Morocco were stuck choosing between impersonal shared shuttles and overpriced, unreliable taxis. We started with a single vehicle and a promise ŌĆö every guest would be treated like family, every journey would run on time, and every price would be fixed before the wheels ever turned.
about.story_p2: Today, our fleet covers private tours, airport transfers, city-to-city routes, and group transport across the entire country ŌĆö from the souks of Marrakech to the Sahara dunes and the coast of Casablanca. What hasn't changed is who we are: a small, hands-on Moroccan team who still personally vet every driver, plan every itinerary, and answer every WhatsApp message ourselves.

values.title: Trust & Transparency
values.desc: Fixed prices agreed before you travel ŌĆö no meters, no hidden fees, no last-minute surprises.

values.title: Local Expertise
values.desc: Every driver and guide is Moroccan, trained, and knows the roads, the culture, and the best hidden spots.

values.title: Reliability
values.desc: Flight tracking, punctual pickups, and clear communication from booking to drop-off.

values.title: Personal Care
values.desc: Every trip is tailored to you ŌĆö your pace, your interests, your group, not a fixed tour bus schedule.

stats.title: 6+ Years
stats.desc: Serving travellers from across the world with premium transport services.

stats.title: 3 Languages
stats.desc: Our drivers speak English, French and Arabic for seamless communication.

stats.title: 5,000+ Clients
stats.desc: Thousands of happy travellers have trusted us with their Moroccan journey.

about.team_body: Behind every smooth transfer and every well-planned tour is a small team of drivers and coordinators based in Marrakech and Casablanca ŌĆö the same faces who'll greet you at the airport and the same people who answer when you call.
